{{Quote|Gamorrean, I saw you save my daughter. I see nobility in your eyes.|[[Lorn Kabul]]|<ref name="Three Against the Galaxy">{{Tales|3|Three Against the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Grissom''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] with a strong sense of honor and a noble character.

==Biography==
Over the course of his life, Grissom saw most of his Gamorrean friends slaughtered in battle, and wore several long scars along the left side of his face. Later, his wife and daughter fell victim to a fatal [[Virus|disease]], and he cradled both in his arms as they [[Death/Legends|died]]. Having lost his family, Grissom pursued a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] career and was employed by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] for a time.

When Jabba was killed during [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] rescue of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Grissom once more found himself alone and without purpose. For some time, he traveled the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], taking whatever job he could get, and eventually ended up working as a pitfighter on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Otunia]]. One evening in the local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]], who was harassing a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] named [[Arista Kabul]], caused Grissom to spill his drink. Though Grissom ignored the intrusion, the Gran subsequently provoked him, and Grissom's frustrations boiled over. Grissom knocked out the Gran, starting a bar fight. Grissom was arrested by the local security and forced into working at Arista's influential [[Lorn Kabul|father's]] quarry.

A week after that incident, Arista's uncle [[Seth Kabul]], who had made an alliance with the foundering [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], attempted to assassinate Arista's father by planting a powerful explosive device in the quarry, set to explode during Lord Kabul's inspection rounds. Grissom survived the explosion and saved Arista's life. Her father, mortally injured, asked Grissom to protect Arista and help her get off planet. Cradling an unconscious Arista in his arms, Grissom's recalled how helpless he felt when his daughter died in his arms [[Standard year/Legends|years]] back.

Assisted by a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] named [[Tek]], Grissom and Arista eventually managed to sabotage Seth's operation and escape from the planet. In the unlikely trio, Grissom's life once more gained a purpose, and Grissom himself gained two invaluable friends.
